rulings.Case Title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Per Ccp 2023.030(D)(3)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 1 - DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions Per Ccp 2023.030(D)(3). Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPNAY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1)Plaintiff hasn't complied with CRC 3.113(d), has 22 pages seven more than permitted. Seven pages stricken. 2)Sustain without leave to amend causes of action 1-3, 8, 10-12. 3)Overrule causes of action 7 and 9, previously overruled. 4)Overrule causes of action 4-6, sufficiently plead re deceit. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY VERKHOLAZ et al VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Jpmorgan Chase Bank And California Reconveyance Company'S Motion To Dismiss For Plaintiffs' Failure To Amend Complaint Following Sustaining Of Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 3 - Defendants Jpmorgan Chase Bank And California Reconveyance Company'S Motion To Dismiss For Plaintiffs' Failure To Amend Complaint Following Sustaining Of Demurrer. Grant Motion to Dismiss in part. Second and Fourth causes of action dismissed with prejudice. Plaintiff shall file amended complaint within 10 days alleging the one remaining cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSE OKELLO VS. INDYMAC MBS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Indymac Mbs, Inc.'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 4 - Defendant Indymac MBS, Inc.'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAM HUNT VS. PETER DOTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney Fees; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 11 - DEFENDANT PETER DOTY's Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney Fees. Hearing required. =(501/EQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. YEDER S. MORALES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 5 - PLAINTIFF DIANA SAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Denied. Failed to shift burden while separate statement not mandatory must set forth necessary undisputed facts in motion supported by competent evidence. Contrary to moving party's statement page 4 line 4 declaration of Diana Sam does not show all elements of CCP 1161a, e.g., 1) Service and expiration of 3 day notice. 2) No evidence as to Diego's execution of Deed of Trust and 3) Possession. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW VS. KEVIN CASEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 6 - DEFENDANT KEVIN CASEY's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, subject to opposition and condition rent is posted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ANDRE RUCKER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 10, 2012, line 7 - DEFENDANT ANDRE RUCKER's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Hearing required. To provide copy of settlement agreement and address compliance with it. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMBROSE RP, INC. VS. MIMI COVE et al
